violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025
The light bulb in the walk in cooler was nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
No allergen statement posted. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
Several uncovered containers of food observed in lowboy freezer. Food must be protected from contamination by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
Frozen sliced ham and turkey observed in the same container, in contact with the water from thawing. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of biofilm and residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Service technician arrived during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (cutting board) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Sausage was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sausage was placed in freezer to rapidly chill. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Turkey, ham, and turkey bacon observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
Ham observed marked with a date exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 600 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

Food observed stored on the floor in the mop room/ice machine room, and in the gas station market walk in.Food observed stored on shelves less than 6 inches above the floor in the service area, and in the gas station market walk in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the mop sink/ice machine room, and on shelves less than 6 inches from the floor in the service area. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of food containers have an accumulation of paper and adhesive. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the portable fan in the service area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and soil residue. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
PIC stated mop buckets are dumped outside. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025

The floors in the mop sink/ice machine room have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The floor beneath Brewology shelves in the gas station market walk in cooler have an accumulation of dried liquid and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The lightbulb in the walk in cooler was nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2025

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024
Drain plugs at 3 bay sink were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024

The floors under ice machine and equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of orange debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice machine must be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
Spoons were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
Single service items such as cups were observed in the mop sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
Hot water handle at handsink was observed in poor repair (hot water not dispensing). Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
Drain plugs at 3 bay sink were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Trash and litter was observed surrounding refuse area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

The floors under ice machine and equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2024
